extractions.key_text: Prometheus monitoring server UI served by Packetware instance. Page title: 'Prometheus Time Series Collection and Processing Server'. Global config: GLOBAL_AGENT_MODE=false, GLOBAL_READY=true, GLOBAL_LOOKBACKDELTA=5m. This confirms Packetware runs Prometheus for metrics collection.

extractions.key_text: crt.sh certificate transparency log for treas.gov domain. Contains 174+ subdomains across all Treasury bureaus: BEP (Bureau of Engraving and Printing), TIGTA, OFR, OIG, FinCEN, OCC, etc. Captured 2025-03-27. Evidence of full Treasury domain inventory via CT logs.
